purpose: Define the fixed flat receipt contract that Python may derive from a verified WUCI-WARRANT JSON receipt and assembly can enforce through gate-contract-verify, open-authorized-contract, release-authorized-contract, and rooted Gate commands that pin group-public-key to a WUCI-ROOT authority file.
format_constraints: Exactly one 'label: value' field per line.
Labels must appear in field_order exactly.
Labels are lowercase and use hyphen separators.
The file ends with exactly one trailing newline.

value_constraints.action: one of open, release, trust, publish; assembly open-authorized-contract and open-authorized-rooted accept only open, and release-authorized-contract and release-authorized-rooted accept only release
value_constraints.group-public-key: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.group-commitment: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.signature-commitment: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters; must match group-commitment

assembly_non_goals: Do not parse release receipt JSON in assembly.
Do not parse receipt JSON in assembly.
Do not accept arbitrary signer material.
Do not accept non-open actions through open-authorized-contract.
Do not accept non-open actions through open-authorized-rooted.
Do not accept non-release actions through release-authorized-contract.
Do not accept non-release actions through release-authorized-rooted.
Do not make Python the canonical authorization-message owner.
